title: Design a Rothko Painting
description: An abstract Rothko-inspired painting built purely with CSS. Three colored rectangles sit inside a canvas div with overflow: hidden and a blur filter. Each rectangle uses margin, border-radius, box-shadow, and slight rotations via transform to create the soft, painterly appearance typical of Rothko's work.
objectives: Use overflow: hidden to clip child elements within a container
Apply filter: blur() to soften element edges
Use box-shadow with matching color to create a glow effect
Use border-radius with multiple values for organic shapes
Use transform: rotate() to tilt elements slightly
